data.name: Parallel Speed
data.description: Low latency across a broad range of use cases.

data.name: Parallel Core 2x
data.description: High complexity cross-referenced outputs. Typical latency: 60s - 10min. Recommended for up to ~10 fields.

data.name: Parallel Pro
data.description: Exploratory web research. Typical latency: 2min - 10min. Recommended for up to ~20 fields.

data.name: Parallel Ultra
data.description: Advanced multi-source deep research. Typical latency: 5min - 25min. Recommended for up to ~20 fields.

data.name: Parallel Ultra 2x
data.description: Difficult deep research. Typical latency: 5min - 50min. Recommended for up to ~25 fields.

data.name: Parallel Ultra 4x
data.description: Very difficult deep research. Typical latency: 5min - 90min. Recommended for up to ~25 fields.

data.name: Parallel Ultra 8x
data.description: The most difficult deep research. Typical latency: 5min - 2hr. Recommended for up to ~25 fields.

data.name: Parallel Lite Fast
data.description: Basic metadata, fallback, lowest latency. Typical latency: 10s - 20s. Recommended for up to ~2 fields.

data.name: Parallel Base Fast
data.description: Reliable standard enrichments. Typical latency: 15s - 50s. Recommended for up to ~5 fields.

data.name: Parallel Core Fast
data.description: Cross-referenced, moderately complex outputs. Typical latency: 15s - 100s. Recommended for up to ~10 fields.

data.name: Parallel Core 2x Fast
data.description: High complexity cross-referenced outputs. Typical latency: 15s - 3min. Recommended for up to ~10 fields.

data.name: Parallel Pro Fast
data.description: Exploratory web research. Typical latency: 30s - 5min. Recommended for up to ~20 fields.

data.name: Parallel Ultra Fast
data.description: Advanced multi-source deep research. Typical latency: 1min - 10min. Recommended for up to ~20 fields.

data.name: Parallel Ultra 2x Fast
data.description: Difficult deep research. Typical latency: 1min - 20min. Recommended for up to ~25 fields.

data.name: Parallel Ultra 4x Fast
data.description: Very difficult deep research. Typical latency: 1min - 40min. Recommended for up to ~25 fields.

data.name: Parallel Ultra 8x Fast
data.description: The most difficult deep research. Typical latency: 1min - 1hr. Recommended for up to ~25 fields.
